case_title: KENNETH KOSTER et al VS. JOSEPH TERZIAN

docket_entries.description: SC 109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOSTER, KENNETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT YULIYA KOSTER WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED NOV-26-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TERZIAN, JOSEPH
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY TERZIAN, JOSEPH AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KOSTER, KENNETH KOSTER, YULIYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT YULIYA KOSTER WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TERZIAN, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT KOSTER, KENNETH KOSTER, YULIYA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT KOSTER, KENNETH

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, SC-290 - ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT STAMPED: "FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST". AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KOSTER, KENNETH KOSTER, YULIYA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,359.00 FILED BY KOSTER, KENNETH KOSTER, YULIYA AS TO DEFENDANT TERZIAN, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOSTER, KENNETH KOSTER, YULIYA AS TO DEFENDANT TERZIAN, JOSEPH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JAN-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KOSTER, YULIYA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JAN-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KOSTER, KENNETH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOSTER, KENNETH KOSTER, YULIYA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TERZIAN, JOSEPH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
